note: Central registry of designer LAYOUT families (DDR R3: registration-based, N families; the stable thing is the registry, not the number). check-designer-boundary.mjs validates each designer surface's designer.family.json `family` against the keys here. This file is vendored per-repo (CI single-repo checkout); keep the enterprise copy in sync — registryVersion mismatch is reported as stale.

block-tree.description: Recursive block tree (page / form / list / detail / report). Layer-1 kernel = unified-designer (CanvasHost + BlockRegistry + node-tree store).

grid.description: Free grid of widgets (dashboard). Layer-1 kernel = core-dashboard grid + SharedChartFactory.

flow.description: Node-and-edge graph (automation / BPM / BPMN). Layer-1 kernel = flow-designer-sdk (@xyflow/react based).

physical-canvas.description: Absolute mm/px canvas for print/label (QR designer). No shared Layer-1 kernel yet — only one physical surface exists; DDR non-goal to extract physical-canvas-sdk until a 2nd appears. Surfaces own their canvas math but must consume Layer-0 SDK.

cell-grid.description: Spreadsheet-style cell grid (Chinese-style/spreadsheet report, B8). 5th family; kernel not yet built (planned on Univer). Registered so the gate accepts it once B8 lands.
